description_long: This helmet is a stylized, futuristic combat helmet with a predominantly white base and bold blue angular stripes running across its surface. The front features a black, full-face visor with a pronounced brow and a central blue ridge running from the top to the back. On the left side, the name 'FISHER' is written in black, graffiti-like text above the visor band. The helmet has sculpted details such as vent-like slits near the mouth area, ribbed tubes on the cheeks, and geometric blue panels on the sides and back. The rear view reveals a circular blue accent and additional blue striping, while the overall form is rounded and robust, suggesting protective functionality. The surface appears matte with a hard, smooth finish, and the design is reminiscent of science fiction or fantasy armor.
description: A white and blue futuristic helmet with bold stripes, a black full-face visor, and the name 'FISHER' inscribed on the side. The helmet features sculpted vents, ribbed cheek tubes, and a matte, hard surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black full-face visor, central blue ridge, and blue angular stripes across the faceplate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the 'FISHER' text above the visor band and the ribbed cheek tube detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a circular blue accent, blue striping, and the helmet's rounded back profile.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals blue geometric panels, ribbed cheek tube, and continuation of the blue striping.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two small horizontal vent slits on the lower front, one on each side of the mouth area; ribbed tubes on both cheeks may also serve as vents.
attribute_graphic_design: White base with bold blue angular stripes, black full-face visor, and the name 'FISHER' in black graffiti-style text on the left side.
